meaning: n.[医]贫血,贫血症 (Anaemia) var → anemia
examples: Symptoms of anaemia include general fatigue and lassitude.
Sickle-cell anaemia is passed on through a recessive gene.
She suffered from anaemia and even required blood transfusions.
In Egypt, Peru and Mexico, about half the women with anaemia are overweight or obese.
The authorities originally said that Mr Ashiri had died from complications resulting from sickle cell anaemia.
